subject: a whole bunch of deal errors that i want your opinion on .

emails.subject: A whole bunch of deal errors that I want your opinion on .
emails.subject_base: A whole bunch of deal errors that I want your opinion on .
emails.body: A whole bunch of deal errors that I want your opinion on I just ran a forward ob for April 2 to check for deals that are in PST when they should be PDT. Do you want to change all of these to PPT deals, or do you have time constraints today? I need these changed today because we are already setting up for April. SW Regions 347721 353734 353813 407053 352524 361210 352809 346646 346647 352628 360473 360475 360477 360483 361244 366541 366543 346822 348162 NW Regions 318870 349864 I am particularly worried about how these are corrected because they are long term transmission deals that cannot be autoscheduled. 503107 503112

emails.subject: Re: A whole bunch of deal errors that I want your opinion on .
emails.subject_base: A whole bunch of deal errors that I want your opinion on .
emails.body: Re: A whole bunch of deal errors that I want your opinion on 503107 and 503112 have both been changed to reflect the correct time zones. I checked the strips after changing them to PPT and it looks like Deal Entry separated them correctly between PST and PDT. I'm working on the rest now. Kate Cara Semperger 03/23/2001 01:39 PM

emails.subject: Re: A whole bunch of deal errors that I want your opinion on .
emails.subject_base: A whole bunch of deal errors that I want your opinion on .
emails.body: Re: A whole bunch of deal errors that I want your opinion on The last two LTNW deals 349864 and 318870 are changed to correct time zones. They gave me the option to choose "no" for rerouting of schedules. They were both EOL deals. Kate Cara Semperger 03/23/2001 01:39 PM
